Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grandmaster Endross]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmaster Endross is young, dark, and strong.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmaster Endross is obsessed with combat strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmaster Endross has a predecessor he replaced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Grandmaster Endross is a lithe, muscled man with dark skin who stepped out of the Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Grandmaster Endross can wreathe his left hand in a rolling thunderstorm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Endross is a Grandmaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Endross uses a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Grandmaster Endross has dark eyes and rests his hands on the hilts of his swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Grandmaster Endross wields two swords and a swirling thunderstorm.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
